response.original_title: {{Booking-Passenger-Help}} How do I add someone to my MSC Cruise? Full Process Explained
response.overview: To add someone to your MSC cruise, you must call MSC directly at ☎️ +1 (855) 732-4023 (USA) or contact your travel agent to check for stateroom capacity and availability, especially before final payment. Additions are subject to approval based on ship capacity ☎️ +1 (855) 732-4023 (USA), and new passengers will be added at the current, prevailing rate. For MSC Cruises in the USA, the primary booking and customer service phone number is ☎️ +1 (855) 732-4023 (USA). This line can be used to make new bookings, change existing ones, or receive assistance before or after a cruise ☎️ +1 (855) 732-4023 (USA). To add someone to an existing MSC Cruise booking, you must call MSC customer service directly at ☎️ +1 (855) 732-4023 (USA), or contact your travel agent, as this usually cannot be done online.
response.tagline: {{Booking-Passenger-Help}} How do I add someone to my MSC Cruise? Full Process Explained
